title: Strategy: To Respond
description: Do not initiate from your head. Wait for life to offer something, then check your gut. If something expands in your body, that is your yes. If not, it is a no — no explanation needed.
learningGoal: The viewer understands, in plain daily-life terms, what "to respond" means for them and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: Do not initiate from your head.
Wait for life to offer something, then check your gut.
If something expands in your body, that is your yes.
If not, it is a no
forbiddenClaims: following your strategy guarantees a specific outcome
you will never feel resistance again
strategy is a rigid rule rather than a felt practice

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Strategy: To Respond — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Strategy: To Respond — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: Strategy: To Respond — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Strategy: To Respond — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Strategy: To Respond — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: Do not initiate from your head. Wait for life to offer something, then check your gut. If something expands in your body, that is your yes. If not, it is a no — no explanation needed.
